_comment: biosecurity-intel-dashboard autonomous-mode hooks. Fires automatically at lifecycle events so the user doesn't have to remember to invoke source-integrity / security-posture / handoff-discipline agents manually.

PreToolUse._comment: Block writes/edits to source-attribution-sensitive paths and curated data files until the matching agent has reviewed (writes .claude/.source-reviewed-this-session).
Block commands likely to commit a file containing a common secret pattern.

PostToolUse._comment: After any Edit or Write, remind to run test-agent's verification cadence before commit.
PostToolUse.command: echo 'Reminder: run test-agent (npm run test:validators && npm run validate:data && npm run build) before commit. Run handoff-discipline-agent to confirm HANDOFF.md entry.'

Stop._comment: On session stop, remind about HANDOFF.md discipline and push-before-shipped rule.
